subject: Upgrade PMMapper CSITs to verification jobs
commit_message:
Upgrade PMMapper CSITs to verification jobs

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2796
Signed-off-by: Lasse Kaihlavirta <l.kaihlavirt@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Build Unstable 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-jjb-verify/5568/ : UNSTABLE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-jjb-verify/5568/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ci-management-jjb-verify/5568

Patch Set 1:

Note that these need https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/121515 to pass, and I can't immediately find a way to verify these together without merging the jobs (even the basic maven java build didn't pass in Sandbox even though it works in Jenkins proper and I couldn't find any obvious remedy to it). However, if these jobs are merged, it should be noted that they will *fail* all PM-Mapper reviews until the above commit is working and merged.
